Company risk index

Public index of logistics companies based on automated trust signals (fraud events, coordinated attacks, review risk).

Browse Companies Directory
Risk: HIGH
Search
Limit
Loading…

How to use risk index

Risk index helps identify logistics companies with elevated fraud signals, abnormal review patterns, or trust instability.

Common signals

  • Unusual burst of reviews in short time
  • Reviews from same digital network
  • Possible self-review behaviour
  • High ratio of flagged interactions

Verified companies can reduce false signals through profile ownership.
